cases.request: Introduce orchestration indirection for multi-skill requests and ensure complete output coverage.
Implement code changes and execute the plan tasks.
Learn this topic, decompose it, and challenge assumptions before we implement.
Review all skills and produce an audit with remediation recommendations.
Reorganize our documentation corpus, normalize naming, and regenerate a navigable INDEX across folders.
Write technical reference docs from code and then refresh the documentation index and catalog structure.
Generate a PRD and ensure the docs corpus structure and index make it easy to discover.
Create an ADR with alternatives and consequences, then update document taxonomy and indexes.
Build a multi-step implementation plan and prepare the resulting planning docs for discoverability.
We have a regression with stack traces and exceptions; perform root-cause analysis and fix it.
Draft a system boundary blueprint and decision record, then pressure-test the trade-offs.
Request a structured code review and then remediate accepted findings.
Set up a new CapacitorJS project in an existing SvelteKit app and add it to iOS and Android.
Add camera access and push notifications to our Capacitor app with correct permission handling and web fallbacks.
Harden our Capacitor app for production — security, performance gate, and release submission.
Add OAuth login with token refresh and make critical features work offline.
Automate our Capacitor build and signing pipeline in CI and add production telemetry.
Upgrade our app from Capacitor v5 to v7 with compatibility checks and a rollback plan.
Add OTA live update delivery to our Capacitor app with staged rollout and automatic rollback on crash.
Audit and fix accessibility in our Capacitor hybrid app for VoiceOver and TalkBack before App Store submission.
Set up Universal Links on iOS and App Links on Android so marketing emails open the correct in-app screen.
Configure our Capacitor app to use different API base URLs and app IDs for dev, staging, and production without secrets in source.
Implement end-to-end push notifications with APNs and FCM, Android notification channels, and tap-to-route navigation to the correct screen.
Our App Store submission was rejected for missing PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy entries. Fix the privacy manifest, audit all plugins, and complete the Android data safety form.
